selling_points_predicted: Less touristy alternative to the crowded main section of the Great Wall
Only three hours total transport time from Beijing city center
Just 90 minutes by bus from Beijing, making it a convenient day trip
Complete hike experience from Watchtower 5 to Watchtower 20
Challenging Hero Slope section requiring hands and legs to climb the steep incline
Rich historical narration including stories of the Xiongnu, dynasties, and Wu Sangui's betrayal
Stunning fall foliage and scenic mountain views along the wall
Accessible to various fitness levels including children and elderly visitors
Doable for moderate fitness levels (3-4 out of 10), easy for those in decent shape
Cable car up and scenic ski lift down to minimize exertion
Watchtowers positioned at mountain peaks offering strategic panoramic views
